title: Luffy Returns From the Mirror World
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Judge, Unknown person #9, Nami, Reiju, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11 as The Straw Hats break through Big Mom’s encirclement as allies buy time and Luffy’s fight reaches its conclusion.
scene: Luffy escapes the mirror world while Jinbe, Germa, and the Sun Pirates help the crew break through Big Mom’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: Germa is backing them up!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: shall we attack them, too?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No, ignore them!! Germa is primarily fighting with the fleet at the port!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Doesn't anyone

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why do you care so much about that...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Straw hat Luffy!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am not sure if this is the

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're in a place where escape is impossible once you enter...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It's the yonkou, big mom's territory!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did you really risk your life just to take back that one person!?

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: Sanji is Germa's Failure!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He can't use his skin as a shield...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And all he does is cook. He doesn't have a shred of Royal Pride!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's put his life in danger in order to protect a weak- ling, all because of his USELESS emotions...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He has a weak mind!! He's unfit to be a soldier...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: That man is a good-for- nothing!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Because someone

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: See ya!! Thanks for the help!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: How about you answer me!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Straw Haat!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: That was surprising.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why was he listing out all the good things about you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: That's not what he was doing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Wahaha haha!! You guys are the best.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Nami!! Look ahead!! In front of us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Gyaaaaa AaaAH!! This is bad!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Jinbe, the Grand Fleet is Right in front of us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: When did they...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It looks like they finally noticed...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: There's an unbelievable number of ships..!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What should we do...? We're going to be pincered again!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The idle fleet was able to circle around us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Sunny

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: Germa

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: We're going to be trapped!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: CACAD island

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Fire!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: WAYA!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: We entered their firing range!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: How!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right... we've surrounded you from the front and the back!! You damn rabbit!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Carrot- Chan!!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Finale storyline with 43 dialogue beats. The crew escapes Totto Land through the sacrifices and timing of Jinbe, Germa, and the Sun Pirates.
